Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Chronology of kings

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-11-15 · 4 answers
A friend of mine who is into history asked me if there is any timeline of kings and dates with Yudhistira and Pariksit maharaj etc.
Anyone has a graphic or list with this info?

thanks
user [38] · 2007-11-16
See attachments. No refs for kings, sorry.
user [179] · 2007-11-16
is all i'b4ve read from the law books is that, they where residing 5000 yrs ago, in the capital of New Dheli, as their head quarters. of how many there where its a special number too and as any religion from of the nine there are each one has had ruled from a period in that city along the establishment there are also different years in reason, but of which i will like to specify here that the different rule of religions began from the dwapar-yuga to here now, where we can find those presiding religions too, each had got his time table from there to the world, this 5000 yrs speak us of an entire era which passed along with the entire different rulers of the earth from time to time as prescriptions there where, is wonderful that they all took births in bharatavarsa land (this kings of kings) where we can find the most righteous kings from there in, specially is about the entire kingdom of great souls of which i like to speak of now, which means that they all where kings of kings residing in bharat, the numbers are special and i i will risk to say there where two kingdoms too as definitive emperors of his there where, definitrly, as are the suryavanshis and the chandravanshis descendants kingdom of dynasties, and they are parts of this two different kingdoms more alike, like it is something curious to believe, say for example how is Lord Rama Chandra the head of the Sun Dynasty ( the suryavaansh) and how lord Krsna is the head of the same suryavanshi in the Sat-yuga and so on and has his special moonly character as that the special number of kings and the divine eternal souls associates of that Supreme Person are really significant which follows after these the emperor figure as rulers.. they are always going after the emperors as kings; -birds to the flock, are subject to its rule, however much we can find they gather at different times sometimes they are part of the vijaymala rosary of souls sometimes they make part also of the rudramala souls there are this malas (450,000 soul on each), and there exists also the dynasties actually as to whom follows whom and how, (900,000 together) they make part the kingdom particularly respecting the antecedents and inclinations of each souls. that mean there are numbers specially on the tattva that we all make part of, as in the Gita we can remember it was written there also that "the saintly kings understood it in that way" this science, the Gita science, and so specifically there was the rule to the entire world. so as i can see also it expanded and its also awaited to gather this movement of souls which are also special souls in the entire world tattva from time to time. again and again, likewise the tree keeps spinning.

i am into depicting of which i am also trying to do this great illustrating work of all this one day i will love to show you all how is this the maha-tattva sighted from a revelation only i think shiv can still be making, somehow i came to this and to know also that shiv-shankar-bolenatha is the emperor of this entire material world creation out of which rulers he is actually serving sri krsna, and he will be the emperor of all of those Devas as king within them out of which they gather at the ends with. it is my pleasure.

abhiram prabhu, i have got some graphics but i am also willingly happy to start and make mines too about this. hari bol !
